title: Massaman Marvelous Peruvian Chicken Rocoto Relleno
description: A bitter and springy post-workout Peruvian dish featuring Massaman paste, caramelized to perfection, sugar-free-friendly, in the form of a rocoto relleno.
instructions: Cut the tops off the rocoto peppers and remove the seeds and membranes.
In a blender or food processor, blend the Massaman curry paste, chicken breast, onion, garlic, olive oil, chicken broth, salt, and black pepper until well combined.
Stuff each rocoto pepper with the chicken mixture and place in a baking dish.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the peppers are tender.
While the peppers are baking, caramelize the onion in a pan with a little olive oil until golden brown.
Serve the rocoto relleno with the caramelized onion on top.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
